retrieved_result: What is GCC? \"What is GCC? May 12, 2011 , cherran , Leave a comment What is GCC? GCC stands for the GNU Compiler Collection and as the name suggests, it is a computer compiling system developed by the GNU project. This compiler system is produced to support a wide variety of programming applications and language
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses GCC (GNU Compiler Collection), a compiler, not an integrated development environment (IDE) or a list of top IDEs; therefore it is not relevant to the query.
